creator: mdw@freebsd.org
text:
On 01/15/13 13:29, Romain Tartière wrote:
> Hi!
>
> Is it possible for you to try the version of monodevelop in the BSD#
> repo and confirm it does work:
sure!

I took the trunk (just for devel/monodevelop), merged it manually into 
my portstree and it builds fine now.

Regards,
Manuel
